entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS304) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE ADDITION OF AGENCY-SPECIFIC MNS CLINS, TO ALLOW FOR CONTINUATION OF NBIP-VPN, CSDES, AND ACCESS SERVICES, CURRENTLY BEING PROVIDED UNDER THE CONTINUITY BRIDGE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1577.01E.
2. THE FOLLOWING ALSO APPLY SOLELY TO THIS MODIFICATION:
? THE SLAS AND REPORTING CURRENTLY REQUIRED BY THE CONTINUITY CONTRACT WILL APPLY TO THE SERVICES ASSOCIATED WITH THE PROPOSED CLINS, IN LIEU OF THE SLAS AND REPORTING REQUIREMENTS OF THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT.
? ALL OPERATIONAL PROCESSES CURRENTLY IN PLACE TO SUPPORT ORDERING, MAINTENANCE, BILLING AND DISPUTES UNDER THE CONTINUITY CONTRACT WILL CONTINUE TO BE UTILIZED FOR THESE SERVICES, IN LIEU OF THE OPERATIONAL PROCESSES SPECIFIED BY THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT.
? THE TROUBLE MANAGEMENT PROCESSES UNDER THE CONTINUITY CONTRACT WILL CONTINUE TO BE UTILIZED FOR THESE SERVICES, IN LIEU OF THE TROUBLE MANAGEMENT PROCESSES SPECIFIED BY THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT.
? THE CLINS CONTAINED IN THIS MODIFICATION WILL NOT BE INCLUDED IN ANY REPORTS REQUIRED BY THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT.
? THE CLINS CONTAINED IN THIS MODIFICATION WILL NOT BE INCLUDED IN ANY DELIVERABLES REQUIRED BY THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT WITH THE EXCEPTION OF THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CENTRALIZED INVOICE.
3. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
4. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS305) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. ADDITION OF DELL WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1583.01E.
2. ADDITION OF ACME PACKET WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1575.01E.
3. ADDITION OF ADTRAN WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1584.01E.
4. PRICE REDUCTION FOR WEB CONFERENCING SERVICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1587.01P.
5. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
6. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS306) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD ICB CUSTOMER SPECIFIC DESIGN AND ENGINEERING SERVICE, UNDER THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1588.01E. 2. TO ADD TOLL FREE SERVICE TO THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1579.01E. 3. TO ADD ICB CUSTOMER SPECIFIC DESIGN AND ENGINEERING SERVICE TO THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1590.01E. 4. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 5. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. ADDITION OF HP WIRELINE SED CLIN AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1612.01E.
2. ADDITION OF SECONDARY T1 AND T3 ACCESS PRICING AS DETAILED IN AU1611.01E.
3. ADDITION OF ICB CAA WIRELINE ACCESS PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1593.01E.
4. ADDITION MANAGED NETWORK SERVICE CLIN PRICING (E911) AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1592.01E.
5. ADDITION OF MANAGED EQUIPMENT SERVICE CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN AU1610.01E.
6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.
